text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! We missed the bus all because
of you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Stop whinin', what's done is done. I called and
said we'd be late, so just sit down and chill like an
adult.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Listen here, you and I aren't the same. I have plans! Like reviewing my class notes, for starters!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Dude, I already said I'm sorry for falling asleep!
How many times do you want me to apologize?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: See! That! I came all the way to get you, and you're having an attitude! Do you even know how to apologize?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's not like I asked you to pick me up!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You're always so... so...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm done here. All this yelling is tiring me out.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And there's no vending machine in sight. Better to
not make your throat sore.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...The stars are really out tonight.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I never really look when I'm training.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, who can blame you? These plans for camp
came all of a sudden, and you had to make the
most of it. I... was in the same boat.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...It's cold just sitting here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I can lend you my jacket, if you want.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No. Give me your shoulder instead.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: H-hey.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Can it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I wonder if the bus'll be here soon.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... I hear ya.
